metadata.title: Shake It
metadata.album: Match of the Day: The Album

lyrics.text: I′M GOING UNDER, AND THIS TIME
I FEAR THERE'S NO ONE TO SAVE ME
THIS ALL-OR-NOTHING REALLY GOT A WAY
I GUESS I KINDA LIKED THE WAY YOU NUMBED ALL THE PAIN
TO GET ME THROUGH IT ALL
AND THEN YOU PULLED THE RUG
I WAS GETTING KINDA USED TO
I′M GOING UNDER, AND THIS TIME
I FEAR THERE′S NO ONE TO TURN TO
THIS ALL-OR-NOTHING WAY OF LOVING GOT ME
NOW I NEED SOMEBODY TO KNOW
JUST TO KNOW HOW IT FEELS
I GUESS I KINDA LIKED THE WAY YOU HELPED ME ESCAPE
TO GET ME THROUGH IT ALL
AND THEN YOU PULLED THE RUG
I WAS GETTING KINDA USED TO
AND I TEND TO CLOSE MY EYES
I′LL BE SAFE IN YOUR SOUND
TO GET ME THROUGH IT ALL
AND THEN YOU PULLED THE RUG
I WAS GETTING KINDA USED TO
TO GET ME THROUGH IT ALL
AND THEN YOU PULLED THE RUG
I WAS GETTING KINDA USED TO
AND THEN YOU PULLED THE RUG
I WAS GETTING KINDA USED TO
